title: Collaborative session state management and archiving tools
purpose: Provides tools for managing collaborative session state including tracking task progress, snippet changes, and archiving session data to persistent storage.
module_context: Exports interfaces for session state and update parameters, helper functions for file operations and path construction, and functions for reading, updating, and archiving session state.

steps.content: Construct the file path for the session state file within the project directory.
Return the full path to the collab-state.json file for the specified session.
Attempt to access the specified file path.
IF the access operation succeeds, return true.
ELSE return false.
Generate the file path for the session state file.
IF the session file does not exist, throw an error indicating the session was not found.
Read and parse the session state file content.
Compute a human-readable display name from the state field if not already present.
Return the parsed session state with computed display name.

methods.name: updateSessionState
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, updates: StateUpdateParams, wsHandler?: WebSocketHandler): Promise<{ success: boolean }>

steps.content: Generate the file path for the session state file.
Read the current session state or initialize an empty object if the file does not exist.
Merge the provided updates with the current state to form the new state.
Ensure the directory for the session state file exists.
Write the new session state to the file in JSON format.
IF a WebSocket handler is provided, broadcast the session state update to connected clients.
Return a success indicator.

methods.name: recordSnippetCreated
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, snippetId: string, wsHandler?: WebSocketHandler): Promise<{ success: boolean }>

steps.content: Retrieve the current session state.
Create a copy of the existing created snippets array.
Add the new snippet ID to the created snippets array if it is not already present.
Update the session state with the new created snippets array.

methods.name: recordSnippetUpdated
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, snippetId: string, wsHandler?: WebSocketHandler): Promise<{ success: boolean }>

steps.content: Retrieve the current session state.
Create a copy of the existing updated snippets array.
Add the new snippet ID to the updated snippets array if it is not already present.
Update the session state with the new updated snippets array.

methods.name: recordSnippetDeleted
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, snippetId: string, wsHandler?: WebSocketHandler): Promise<{ success: boolean }>

steps.content: Retrieve the current session state.
Create a copy of the existing deleted snippets array.
Add the new snippet ID to the deleted snippets array if it is not already present.
Filter out the deleted snippet ID from the created snippets array.
Filter out the deleted snippet ID from the updated snippets array.
Update the session state with the new deleted snippets array and filtered created/updated arrays.

methods.name: getSnippetStateSummary
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<{ created: number; updated: number; deleted: number; snippets: string[] }>

steps.content: Retrieve the current session state.
Extract the created, updated, and deleted snippets arrays from the session state.
Combine all snippet IDs into a single deduplicated array.
Return a summary object with counts and the combined snippet IDs.

methods.name: archiveSession
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, options: ArchiveOptions): Promise<ArchiveResult>

steps.content: Extract the delete session and timestamp options from the provided options.
Construct the paths for the session directory and its subdirectories.
Generate the archive folder name with optional timestamp.
Verify that the session directory exists.
Verify that the archive directory does not already exist.
Create the archive directory.
Copy documents from the session directory to the archive directory.
Copy diagrams from the session directory to the archive directory.
Copy designs from the session directory to the archive directory.
Copy spreadsheets from the session directory to the archive directory.
Copy snippets from the session directory to the archive directory, skipping hidden files.
Delete the session directory if the delete option is enabled.
Return the archive result including the archive path and list of archived files.
